case_title: SOUTHLAND CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION vs. CHURCHILL, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUTHLAND CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, RICHARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, RICHARD
